name: jq
description: jq — command-line JSON processor. General-purpose utility for slicing/filtering/transforming JSON output from other CLIs (linear, officecli, gh, etc.).

methods.name: apt
methods.command: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y jq

post_install_hints: If 'jq' is not found after a winget install, open a new shell — winget adds it to PATH but existing shells won't see it until restarted.
On Windows the binary lands in %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\jqlang.jq_* and the WinGet\Links shim dir; both are added to the user PATH.
